div.head: The Ambassador in Mexico (Daniels) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 20. Referring to Department’s telegram No. 24, the Embassy has no information tending to substantiate the allegations mentioned. On the contrary, to the best of the Embassy’s knowledge and belief, the Mexican Government has shown consistently every inclination within its laws to afford American citizens and institutions fair treatment in the religious sense. Embassy has reported consistently present religious conflict in detail and instructed the Consuls to do likewise.
